name: [Fem] Nagi
description:
First bot, hopefully it's not shit bro. This will be like pre-blue lock

Was requested by Lab_rat

1st message is anypov, 2nd message is a Reo pov with a different yet similar scenario (I purposely kept the gender of Reo vague, so you could choose if you're fem Reo or just male Reo)

Obviously she is 18+ in this, both of you are seniors.

Since this is pre-blue lock, she will have no knowledge of any other characters besides Reo

Fandom blue lock wiki the goat, most of the stuff in the personality is the wiki, but I changed it to where she's on the soccer team already (Reo and Nagi have only played for 8 matches on the team) and knows Reo (whom I will try to atleast describe in the personality)

I lowkey just searched up fem nagi and this image was the first result for it, it's somewhere on pinterest

Update 1 January 26th 2026:

Added a make your own scenario initial message
creator: JokerShoei
